tooltips.exact-text-match: Exact text match: Search dialogs containing a user question corresponding exactly to the text indicated. Click to launch a partial search.
tooltips.partial-text-match: Partial text match: Search dialogs containing a user question containing the text indicated. Click to search exactly the given text.
tooltips.show-dialogs-after-date: Show dialogs containing messages created after this date
tooltips.show-dialogs-before-date: Show dialogs containing messages created before this date
tooltips.search-dialogs-by-config: Search for dialogs using this configuration.
tooltips.search-dialogs-by-connector: Search for dialogs using this connector.
tooltips.search-dialogs-by-intent: Search dialogs containing exchanges corresponding to the selected intent.
tooltips.hide-exchanges-by-intent: Hide exchanges corresponding to selected intents.
tooltips.display-studio-test-dialogs: Display dialogues held from the studio test view
tooltips.display-only-rag-dialogs: Display only dialogs containing Rag responses
tooltips.show-annotations-after-date: Show annotations created after this date
tooltips.show-annotations-before-date: Show annotations created before this date
